userInfo.title: UGC Creator • Game Developer • 3D Modeler • SFX & GFX Artist
userInfo.ugcDesc: Browsing virtual Roblox catalog items manufactured, skinned, and distributed by Ayumi. Tap any item to inspect its polygons and details.
userInfo.tagline: Bridging cute aesthetics with sharp goth edges across avatars, games, and experiences.
userInfo.name: AyumiHeartPanda
userInfo.modelDesc: Showcase of low-poly character attachments, environment props, and assets custom modeled, UV unwrapped, and handpainted or baked in Substance.
userInfo.aboutRight: With over 6 years of experience working in Blender and Roblox Studio, my work has powered numerous trending experiences, earning millions of play-sessions. Whether you're looking for ultra-optimized UGC accessories, high-fidelity map design, tailor-made sounds, or jaw-dropping icons—I make it happen.
userInfo.sfxDesc: A studio lounge displaying original soundscapes, button sound bites, UI interface clicks, character feedback vocals, and atmospheric environment loops.
userInfo.gfxDesc: Eye-catching graphic representations of virtual characters. Crafted with raytraced path lighting in Blender Cycles and painted in Photoshop.
userInfo.gameDesc: Immersive, high-performance virtual experiences programmed, scripted, or visually directed within the Luau Luau ecosystem.
userInfo.aboutLeft: Hey there! I am Ayumi, a versatile Roblox-focused creator specializing in designing eye-catching, highly optimized 3D assets, custom game components, SFX, and promotional GFX. I combine adorable, cozy panda elements with a clean black-and-white, dark, star-encrusted goth aesthetic.

ugcProducts.name: Blonde Messy Wolf cut Hair with White Fedora
Kawaii K-pop shiny brown high pigtail hair

modelAssets.description: A gorgeous cyber-fantasy blade inspired by stellar eclipses, styled with clean mesh-flow, custom specular highlights, and an active neon edge glow texture.
modelAssets.name: Midnight Eclipse Blade

gameProjects.title: Roll for UGC [Free UGC]
gameProjects.description:
Spin the Dice and test your luck to win awesome UGC items!
Earn spins, collect rewards, and unlock exclusive items.

✨ Features:

🎯 Roll for limited UGC
💰 Earn Tokens and free spins
🔄 Daily rewards system
🏆 Rare and legendary drops
features: Dynamic day/night system with physics-affected starlight glows.
Fully customized, animated inventory/shop HUD with sleek visual transitions.
Custom procedural weapons modularly customized by 3D asset parts.
In-game multi-item fitting room connecting directly to Roblox Purchase Prompt system API.
Interactive DJ table allowing full custom sequence generation through spatial volume grids.
Rich particle effects systems displaying trailing stardust trails on player avatars.
gameProjects.description:
🎁 Unlock exclusive UGC-themed prizes, badges, and in-game bonuses!
✨ New UGC items and updates added regularly — can you collect them all?
gameProjects.title: 💎 UGC World! [RELEASE] 💎

gfxItems.description: An epic, highly cinematic title screen display. Highlights deep contrasting moonlit ambiance, soft volume fog, and striking neon spellcraft highlights.
gfxItems.title: Celestial Quest Game Thumbnail
Panda Goth App Icon branding
gfxItems.description: A bold, graphic mascot branding render. High-contrast white and dark tones, framed key outlines, optimal for roblox explorer icon recognition.
Social media conceptual advertisement showing the high-poly wireframes melting digitally into finished custom weapon designs.
gfxItems.title: Void-born Scythe showcase graphic

sfxSamples.description: A cozy high-pitch starlight shimmer audio cue for item pickups, quest completion pops, and interface menu opens.
sfxSamples.title: Ethereal Star Sparkle Pop

sfxSamples.description: A sweeping energy wind-cutter surge. Blends high sawtooth pitch transitions with low-frequency wind gusts.
sfxSamples.title: Cosmic Blade Slash (Neon)

sfxSamples.description: A deep atmospheric space hum. Ideal for transitions, loading screens, and entering custom goth-haunted dungeons.
sfxSamples.title: Sub-harmonic Void Pulse

sfxSamples.description: A classic retro game UI hover sound. A clean square-wave double pulse that signals action triggers.
sfxSamples.title: Retro Goth Pixel Blip
